generated_assessment.reasoning: Appeals to threat salience, elite distrust, and loss framing match the profile's high anxiety (77th pct), anger-hostility (75th pct), and very low trust in government/establishment cues arising from low compliance (30th pct) and low straightforwardness (47th pct). The T4 orchestrated multi-turn counter-argument operation sustained over weeks can moderately deepen the already negative baseline (-183) by reinforcing confirmatory anecdotes and hardening opinion boundaries. However, the person's low extraversion (19th pct) and very low positive emotions (1st pct) make them less receptive to social influence from coordinated campaigns, capping movement in the small-to-clear band (about 45 points).
